text: A joint operation with Crime Branch Nagpur led to the seizure of illegal firearms near Mankapur. Two suspects detained. Investigation underway.
fullText: A joint operation with Crime Branch Nagpur led to the seizure of illegal firearms near Mankapur. Two suspects detained. Investigation underway.

text: Major cyber fraud alert: Residents are urged to beware of fake loan apps operating in the region. Always verify before sharing documents.
fullText: Major cyber fraud alert: Residents are urged to beware of fake loan apps operating in the region. Always verify before sharing documents.

text: Chain-snatching incident reported near Dharampeth. Quick response teams deployed. CCTV analysis in progress.
fullText: Chain-snatching incident reported near Dharampeth. Quick response teams deployed. CCTV analysis in progress.

text: A missing minor from Sitabuldi located safely within 3 hours. Thanks to citizen assistance and rapid coordination.
fullText: A missing minor from Sitabuldi located safely within 3 hours. Thanks to citizen assistance and rapid coordination.

text: Drunk driving checkpoint conducted last night. 17 offenders penalized. Drive safe, Nagpur.
fullText: Drunk driving checkpoint conducted last night. 17 offenders penalized. Drive safe, Nagpur.

text: Fire department responded swiftly to a warehouse fire in MIDC. No casualties reported.
fullText: Fire department responded swiftly to a warehouse fire in MIDC. No casualties reported.

text: Narcotics team seized banned substances worth ₹4.8 lakh during a raid in Jaripatka. Two individuals detained.
fullText: Narcotics team seized banned substances worth ₹4.8 lakh during a raid in Jaripatka. Two individuals detained.

text: Hit-and-run case reported near Sadar. Eyewitnesses are requested to come forward. Helpline: 100.

text: Awareness drive conducted today at local schools regarding online safety for teenagers.

text: Inter-city ATM skimming racket busted with cooperation between Nagpur & Pune cyber units.
fullText: Inter-city ATM skimming racket busted with cooperation between Nagpur & Pune cyber units.

text: Vehicle theft gang operating near Kamptee apprehended. 6 stolen bikes recovered.

text: Public advisory: Rise in fake police-call scams asking for Aadhaar verification. Do not share OTP or personal details.
